title: Polish Blueberry Salad
description: A refreshing Polish-inspired salad with sweet blueberries and a crispy tangy topping.

ingredients.name: polish salad greens
ingredients.notes: such as sauerkraut or pickled beets

instructions: In a large bowl, combine the Polish salad greens and blueberries.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the tangy Polish dressing and a pinch of salt.
Pour the dressing over the salad greens and blueberries, and toss to coat.
Top the salad with the crunchy Polish bread.
